content:
Folktales
Transfers a curse but forces the new bearer to take a perception penalty.


📜 Why This Works:
✔ Prevents random curse manipulation—only those who seek it out can use it.
✔ Introduces an ethical dilemma—do you use the power or let it go?
✔ Creates another layer of item-based strategy.

📌 FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS FOR VERSION 7.1

1. How should students track their roles and secret abilities?

✔ Should there be an individual tracking sheet, or should students only be reminded when abilities activate?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 410 (chunk 410/555)
